questions.question: Describe the main advantages of the chalk and talk method over the PowerPoint presentation method in a lecture on Eulerian and Hamiltonian graphs. (Choose any two advantages and explain them in 10-15 words each) (5 marks)
What are the limitations of using PowerPoint presentations in teaching Graph Theory? (5 marks)

Compare the effectiveness of chalk and talk method and PowerPoint presentation method in conveying complex concepts like Eulerian and Hamiltonian graphs to a class of 50 students. (Choose any two aspects and explain them in 10-15 words each) (10 marks)
